response.justification: The candidate comfortably meets the minimum bar with roughly 19 years of software engineering experience and a Bachelor's in Computer Science, plus genuine entrepreneurial credentials as founder of an open-source geo-data platform. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products, whereas the candidate's AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented (MCP code generators, agent infrastructure since 2025). Career history shows strong senior/staff IC work but no principal-level scope, strategic advisory experience, or organization-wide technical leadership.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, embedded, low-latency, and infrastructure systems
Founder experience (GISCollective) demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and end-to-end product ownership
Community leadership through workshops, conference talks, and open-source libraries
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI-powered products at scale; AI-agent work is recent and narrow
No advanced degree in an AI-related field (preferred qualification)
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategy, customer advisory, or engineering leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
